element_introduction_order.first_appears: Party Land and Stones 'N Bones tables
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns to sequence shots toward specific ramps/targets

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Speed Devils and Billion Dollar Gameshow tables
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Achieving certain combinations of ramps for prize progression

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Stones 'N Bones (eight successively more rewarding modes)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Complete target bank to unlock modes, then cycle through continuously

element_introduction_order.element: Special ramp tracking (Cyclones, Miles, Skills, Screams)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: First shot counts for two; subsequent shots worth 100,000 point bonus

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Speed Devils (Miles), Billion Dollar Gameshow (Skills), others
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Specific numbers must be hit to activate high-scoring rounds; scores can be lost on tilt
Awarded when exceeding high score or winning final match

typical_relief_triggers: Hitting letter targets to progress objectives
typical_tension_triggers: Progressing through mode sequences requiring precise targeting
Building toward high-scoring rounds with point multipliers
Tilt risk (scores can be lost if tilted during certain modes)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Player-controlled; tension builds with each objective attempt and mode progression, with relief upon completion of letter sequences or ramp combos. Four distinct table themes allow pacing variation based on table choice.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Player selects table and difficulty level at start; basic pinball controls accessible immediately
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progression through letter collection or mode sequences; increasing complexity of ramp combos required for high scores
difficulty_curve.late_game: High-scoring rounds with multipliers; specific number thresholds must be met to unlock timed events; risk of point loss via tilt
notable_spikes: Transitioning from basic pinball to objective-driven letter/combo sequences
Stones 'N Bones mode cycling becomes progressively more demanding
Attempting high-scoring rounds with active multipliers while managing ball control

notable_level_patterns.description: Party Land and Stones 'N Bones require lighting letters (PARTY/CRAZY or STONE-BONE) through target hits to unlock high-scoring events. Stones 'N Bones extends this with eight progressively more rewarding modes unlocked sequentially.

Speed Devils and Billion Dollar Gameshow structure gameplay around achieving specific ramp shots and combinations. Speed Devils emphasizes racing progression (overtaking cars); Billion Dollar Gameshow focuses on prize accumulation via ramp combos.

All tables track running totals of special ramp hits (Cyclones, Miles, Skills, Screams). First shot counts double; subsequent hits worth 100,000 bonus points. Specific thresholds trigger high-scoring modes and special awards.
Extra balls awarded consistently when high score is exceeded or match is won. Provides player agency in ball management and encourages high-score chasing.
